artOfShoe.subtitle: Handcrafted since day one
artOfShoe.title: The art of the shoe.
artOfShoe.body: A tuxedo shoe is not just footwear — it is the final sentence of a well-tailored statement. At Lyzane, we believe elegance begins at the sole. Every curve, every stitch, every finish is deliberate.

craft.title: Craftsmanship in motion.
craft.body: From the first cut of leather to the final polish, our artisans spend over 40 hours on each pair. The mocassin construction wraps the foot in a single piece of leather — seamless, supple, unforgettable.

splitFeature.subtitle: Built for moments that matter
splitFeature.title: Built for moments that matter.
splitFeature.body: Black-tie galas. Wedding aisles. Boardrooms. These are the stages where first impressions are permanent. Our shoes do not follow trends — they transcend them.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Handcrafted tuxedo and mocassin shoes
shop.noProducts: No products found. Check back soon.

product.deliveryInfo: Free delivery on orders over 1000 DH. Standard delivery takes 2-5 business days. Express delivery available at checkout.
product.editorialDesc: Handcrafted with pure Italian leather, designed for the bold and the timeless.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.error: Failed to process order. Please try again.
checkout.successMessage: Your order has been received. We will contact you shortly to confirm delivery details.

footer.description: Classic tuxedo & mocassin shoes. Handcrafted for those who understand that true luxury whispers.
